title: activity — HTTP routes
description: Two route groups. Tenant serves read endpoints for the feed + CRUD for retention policies. Platform-admin serves read-only cross-tenant search for Academorix support. Writes to `Activity` do NOT go through HTTP — every activity is captured via the vendor `LogsActivity` trait on domain models.

groups.description: Tenant activity feed reads + retention policy CRUD. `activity.enforce_scope` middleware filters list results to entities the caller can access (RBAC-scoped).

routes.name: tenant.activities.index
routes.description: Tenant-wide feed. Default filter: entities the caller can access. Filters: filter[log_name], filter[causer_id], filter[subject_type], filter[event], filter[from], filter[to], filter[batched_only]. Sorted DESC by created_at by default; per_page capped at 100 (config.activity.feed.max_page_size).

queryParams.name: filter[log_name]
queryParams.description: One of the registered log_names — 'default', 'bookings', 'auth', etc.

routes.name: tenant.activities.show
routes.description: Single activity detail. `batchSiblings` returns other activities sharing this row's `batch_uuid` — useful for expanding a collapsed feed item.

routes.name: tenant.activities.mine
routes.description: The caller's own activity as causer. Powers the 'My activity' panel on the tenant dashboard.

routes.name: tenant.activities.by-entity
routes.description: The activity stream for one entity. Requires the caller to be able to view the entity itself (checked via the resource's policy — a booking's activity is visible to anyone with `bookings.view` on it).

routes.name: tenant.activities.by-user
routes.description: One actor's activity. Callers see only themselves unless they hold `activity.audit_any` (admin-level compliance surface).

routes.name: tenant.activities.feed
routes.returns: { channels: string[], entitled: boolean, poll_interval_ms: integer|null }
routes.description: WebSocket subscription info. Returns the channel names the caller should subscribe to (their `user.{id}.activity` channel + `tenant.{id}.activity` if entitled for tenant-wide feed). When the tenant lacks `activity_broadcast`, returns entitled=false + poll_interval_ms=15000 (the frontend falls back to polling).

routes.name: tenant.activities.export
routes.description: Asynchronous CSV export. Body: `from`, `to`, `log_names?`, `subject_type?`, `causer_id?`. Gated by `activity_export` entitlement (Medium+). Returns a signed download URL when complete via /api/v1/exports/{id}.

routes.name: tenant.activity-retention-policies.index
routes.description: List retention policies for the tenant. Any active policy plus the effective default (from config) is surfaced.

routes.name: tenant.activity-retention-policies.store
routes.description: Body: `log_name?, retention_days, override_reason, expires_at?`. Gated by `activity_retention_extended` entitlement — without it, requests with retention_days > 90 return 402.

routes.name: tenant.activity-retention-policies.update
routes.description: Body: `retention_days?, override_reason?, expires_at?`. Cannot change `tenant_id` or `log_name` post-create.

routes.name: tenant.activity-retention-policies.destroy
routes.description: Soft-delete. Reverts the (tenant, log_name) pair back to the config default. Deleting a policy DOES trigger an immediate purge sweep if the default is more restrictive than the deleted policy.

groups.description: Cross-tenant read for Academorix support tooling.

routes.name: platform.activities.index
routes.description: Cross-tenant activity search for support tickets + audit-adjacent visibility. Every read is captured in the platform-admin audit context.
